description_long: This object consists of a large, cylindrical metal container with a weathered, mottled brown surface, mounted atop a sturdy wooden platform. The container appears to be a heavy-duty kettle or tank, likely used for holding or heating large volumes of liquid in an urban or industrial setting. A metal spout protrudes from the lower side of the cylinder, suggesting a mechanism for dispensing or draining contents. The wooden base is constructed from thick, slatted planks and reinforced with cross-bracing for stability, giving it a rustic, utilitarian appearance. The top of the cylinder is flat with a subtle, slightly raised lid, but no visible handle or knob. The overall design is robust and functional, with no visible decorative elements.
description: A large, weathered metal kettle or tank sits on a reinforced wooden platform, featuring a side spout and a flat, slightly raised lid. The object has a utilitarian, industrial look with a plain, mottled brown finish.
description_view_0: The cylindrical container is seen from the back, showing the spout emerging from the lower center and the wooden platform's slatted construction.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the spout extending outward and the cross-braced wooden support structure beneath the kettle.
description_view_2: This angle shows the plain side of the kettle with no visible spout, highlighting the robust wooden base and cross-bracing.
description_view_3: The opposite side view displays the spout extending from the lower right, with the wooden platform and its structural details clearly visible.
